title: ficus kochummeniana
intro: Ficus kochummeniana, also known as the bata or bata tree, is a plant species native to tropical Asia, belonging to the fig family (Moraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various gastrointestinal issues such as diarrhea and dysentery. Ficus kochummeniana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
